introSection: Smurf Village Express is a steel roller coaster located at Motiongate in Dubai, Dubai, United Arab Emirates.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The coaster is located in the Smurfs Village section of Motiongate.

sections.title: Theme
sections.content: Smurf Village Express is themed around the cartoon series The Smurfs, more specifically the novel Smurfs and the Howlibird.

fullText:
Smurf Village Express is a steel roller coaster located at Motiongate in Dubai, Dubai, United Arab Emirates.

The coaster is located in the Smurfs Village section of Motiongate.

Smurf Village Express is themed around the cartoon series The Smurfs, more specifically the novel Smurfs and the Howlibird.
